name: Calcutta Carrots (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: ½ teaspoon curry powder, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and scrape the carrots. Cut into strips.
2. Drain pineapple juice into a measuring cup and add enough water to make one cup.
3. Pour the mixture into a dish and add the carrots, curry, salt, and pepper. Cover with vented plastic wrap.
4. Cook on HIGH for 3 or 4 minutes, or until the carrots are tender.
5. Stir in the pineapple chunks, reheat if needed, and serve.
Alternatively, prepare this recipe well ahead of time. Refrigerate the pineapple in a covered container, and store the carrots in a covered microwaveable dish large enough to accommodate the pineapple later. Before serving, stir in the pineapple and microwave on HIGH for 3 or 4 minutes until hot.
